_comment: All fields are optional — missing keys fall back to built-in defaults.
prompt_template: Transform the the reference image into a stylized design as appropriate for a t-shirt or a stenciled poster. Available colors are restricted to {colors} along with {background_color} for the background color, alpha and negative space.  Make colors solid with a single luminosity. Any overlapping layers can only feature one color which must be completely opaque. Shapes should be thick, bold, and lacking in fine detail, with rounded corners and shallow convergences. Things like hair, grass, and other long and sharp portrusions must be stylized as blocks. When using {colors} on a {background_color} background, pay attention to edges and contrast and ensure that the reference image is well represented.
